code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let trimmed = string.trim(line)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(trimmed)
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(trimmed, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      sum = sum + (b - 48)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
